Plaintiffs Jose Henry Vargas Velasquez, Andres Magana, Francisco Castro, and Sergio Gonzalez appearing represented by Eric Toscano, Esq., is placed under oath, and testified.
Defendant Cindy Huang not appearing.

Parties were assisted by Spanish Interpeter Anais Gonzalez Bautista via zoom. Ms. Bautista was sworn as to the Interpreter's oath.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiffs Jose Henry Vargas Velasquez, Andres Magana, Francisco Castgro, and Sergio Gonzalez and they confirm statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.
